svg.title: Strava Performance Analysis — end-to-end project pipeline
svg.desc: Eight sequential stages from Strava API through Python notebooks, local file export, Power BI data model, DAX layer, visualisation, and insights presentation.
svg.text: 3-page dashboard · Bird's Eye · Activity Detail · CV Progress
KPI cards · charts · scatter · matrix · heatmap
Cardiac efficiency · cadence progression · training zone analysis
Modules 0–5 build the foundation · Modules 6–10 deliver the output · Module 11 retrospective
